parityMeta.describes: iOS-17e-2 performance-lookup parity — pain-accumulation + multi-rule issue bump + boost/baseline moduleDose. Two completed upper / shoulder-press sessions, the first flagged via set.painFlag and the second via a Chinese pain note (刺痛) — exercising BOTH hasPainFlag branches. painByExercise[shoulder-press]=2 (>=2) => findLastPerformance feeds issuesForExercise(shoulder-press), which matches BOTH the press rule and the shoulder-press rule, so scapular_control/breathing_ribcage are bumped TWICE (+3 each occurrence => 6 => boost) while upper_crossed/overhead_press_restriction land at 3 (baseline). Only 2 sessions so findRecentPerformances<3 — no drop/improve. FUNCTION-LEVEL compute-assert on the Swift side.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Synthetic history via makeSession (upper / shoulder-press). painRegex matches the literal substring 刺痛. issuesForExercise is NOT deduped, so the buildAdaptiveState forEach applies the +3 bump once per occurrence. lastUpdated substituted with the deterministic clock date.
